hero.title: Design Engineer & Creative Developer
hero.subtitle: I build web experiences people remember.

about.title: Shaping the Future Through Design, Technology, and Bold Ideas.
about.description: Over 8 years building for the web — across startups, agencies, and brands. From simple landing pages to immersive experiences, always with the same attention to detail.

work.title: Featured work
work.description: Creating experiences that people love to use because we start from the starting point of those people.

project2.title: Proyecto Alpha
project2.description: Full-stack application built with modern architectures.

project3.title: Proyecto Beta
project3.description: Interactive dashboard with real-time data processing.

services.title: From Ideation to Launch, I've Got You Covered.
services.description: I design and build web experiences that go beyond the expected — 3D scenes, scroll-driven narratives, and motion-rich interfaces that make people stop and pay attention.

3d.title: 3D Interactive Experiences
3d.description: Your product in 3D — interactive, real-time, web-native. Real-time 3D scenes built for the web. Product visualizers, interactive environments, and narrative experiences that run in the browser without sacrificing performance.

webgl.title: WebGL & Shader Effects
webgl.description: Visual effects that feel impossible — and run in the browser. Custom GLSL shaders for transitions, distortions, particle systems, and post-processing effects.

scroll.title: Scroll Storytelling
scroll.description: A story that unfolds as you scroll. Scroll-driven narratives where every pixel of movement is intentional.

premium.title: Premium Websites
premium.description: A site that sells before anyone reads a word. Launch sites, product pages, and campaign experiences where the visual impact is the message.

brand.title: Portfolio & Brand Sites
brand.description: Your brand, crafted pixel by pixel. Premium sites for studios, agencies, and creative professionals.

motion.title: Motion-rich Interfaces
motion.description: Interfaces that feel alive. Page transitions, micro-interactions, animated components, and gesture-driven experiences.

process.title: A process built around clarity and craft.
process.description: No surprises, no handoff chaos. Just a clear path from the first conversation to a product that works.

discovery.title: Discovery
discovery.description: Understanding your goals, audience, and constraints before touching a single pixel.

concept.title: Concept & Design
concept.description: Visual direction, interaction design, and prototyping. You see it before I build it.

development.title: Development
development.description: Pixel-perfect implementation with performance and attention to detail built in.

launch.title: Launch & Beyond
launch.description: Deployment, testing, and support. I don't disappear after the handoff.

contact.title: Interested in working together?
contact.subtitle: Drop a line or simply get in touch
